underlying_goal: Initialize a new Go project (alarm-receiver) with proper repository setup, module initialization, and directory structure, working collaboratively as pair programmers
friction_detail: User interrupted Claude's tool calls multiple times when Claude tried to do things the user had already done (cloning, go mod init) or took wrong approaches (searching wrong Jira queries, trying to clone into non-empty dir).
brief_summary: User wanted to collaboratively set up a new Go alarm-receiver project with GitHub repo and proper structure; they got through repo creation, naming decisions, and module init but the session ended before completing directory structure and first commit.
